# Dewangga Praxindo

> DeFi smart contract engineer (Solidity + Rust + Move) based in Yogyakarta, Indonesia. 3+ years building secure, audited protocols. $50M+ TVL deployed across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Solana, and Sui. Three full security audits, zero critical findings.

Dewangga Praxindo (online: dewaxindo) writes production smart contracts that move real money: leverage vaults, liquidity-pool management, yield strategies, ZK privacy circuits (Noir), and passkey wallet infrastructure. He works end-to-end — contracts plus the web app they talk to (React, Next.js, TypeScript). Every change ships with fuzz tests, invariant tests, mutation testing, Slither and Aderyn before any audit.

## Expertise
- Languages: Solidity, Rust, Move (Sui), TypeScript
- Chains: Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Solana, Sui, Polygon
- DeFi: leverage vaults, liquidity pools, yield optimization, cross-chain integrations; integrations with AAVE, Compound, Pendle, Uniswap V3/V4
- Security: fuzz/invariant/mutation testing (Foundry), Slither, Aderyn; protocols audited with zero critical findings
- ZK & Privacy: zero-knowledge proofs with Noir; sealed predictions and time-locked reveals on Sui (Seal + Walrus)
- Web3 infra: passkey wallets (WebAuthn), MCP servers, x402 USDC payments

## Projects
- [TOLDPROOF](https://toldproof.xyz): Verifiable reputation for AI agents and humans. Sealed predictions on Sui + Walrus + Seal with time-locked reveal; multi-agent AI resolution (Claude + GPT + Gemini) attests outcomes on-chain; MCP + x402 USDC payments. Sui Overflow 2026 Walrus track. 0 Critical/High/Medium across 3 audits. Code: https://github.com/BadGenius22/toldproof
- [Factor Finance](https://pro.factor.fi/strategies): Smart contract engineer for leverage vaults, LP management, and yield strategies on Arbitrum. $50M+ TVL. PeckShield audited, zero critical findings.
- [Vouch Protocol](https://vouch-protocol.vercel.app): Privacy-preserving credential verification using Noir ZK circuits and Anchor programs on Solana. Code: https://github.com/BadGenius22/vouch-protocol
- [RekonGG](https://app.rekon.gg): AI-powered esports prediction market on Polymarket with x402 crypto payments. Code: https://github.com/BadGenius22/Rekon
- [LazorKit SDK](https://lazorkit-lovat.vercel.app): Passkey-based Solana wallet template. WebAuthn (Face ID / Touch ID), gasless transactions via Paymaster. Next.js 16 + TypeScript. Code: https://github.com/BadGenius22/Lazorkit
- [Amaly](https://amaly.app): Full-stack PWA for Muslim ibadah tracking. Prayer logging, Dzikir reader, Quran reader, gamified leaderboard, 69 badges, push notifications. 224+ users during Ramadan 2026.
- [Battle of Heroes](https://devpost.com/software/battle-of-heroes): NFT battle game with Chainlink VRF V2 + Automation on Polygon. Chainlink Fall 2022 Hackathon winner ($500 Top Quality Project). Code: https://github.com/BadGenius22/BoH-BackEnd
